case_title: MOVEMENTS IN DESIGN VS STEIGERWALD CATHERINE C/O BILL TRAINER WORTHAM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $998.75 FILED BY MOVEMENTS IN DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT STEIGERWALD CATHERINE C/O BILL TRAINER WORTHAM WORTHAM, BILL TRAINER  C/O PETER GUARDINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1989 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOVEMENTS IN DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEIGERWALD CATHERINE C/O BILL TRAINER WORTHAM $566.66 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $598.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR & AMEND JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT STEIGERWALD CATHERINE C/O BILL TRAINER WORTHAM HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR & AMEND JUDGMENT OF NOV-19-1992, GRANTED
NOTICE OF RULING ON MOTION TO MOVEMENTS IN DESIGN RETURNED, FORW. ORDER EXPIRED.
